name: LUXY Ride — All Site Visitors
pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fires on any page of luxyride.com
stackadapt_setup: Create retargeting audience pool using Universal Pixel. URL rule: contains 'luxyride.com'.

name: LUXY Ride — Pricing Page Visitors
pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fires on /pricing or /rates page
stackadapt_setup: Create retargeting audience. URL rule: contains '/pricing' OR contains '/rates'.

name: LUXY Ride — Booking Started (Not Completed)
stackadapt_setup: Create audience from Universal Pixel event. Event: booking_start. Exclude: booking_complete.

name: LUXY Ride — Multiple Visits (3+)
pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fire count >= 3 within 14 days
stackadapt_setup: Create frequency-based audience. Min visits: 3. Period: 14 days.

name: LUXY Ride — Converted (EXCLUDE FROM ALL)
stackadapt_setup: Create exclusion audience from booking_complete event. Apply to ALL campaigns.

name: LUXY Ride — Touch 1 Pool
pixel_rule: All site visitors who have NOT been served Touch 1
stackadapt_setup: Target: All Site Visitors audience. No prior touch exclusion.

name: LUXY Ride — Touch 2 Pool
pixel_rule: Served Touch 1 AND did NOT click/engage
stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 1 served audience. Exclude: Touch 1 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

name: LUXY Ride — Touch 3 Pool
pixel_rule: Served Touch 2 AND did NOT click/engage
stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 2 served audience. Exclude: Touch 2 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

name: LUXY Ride — Touch 4 Pool
pixel_rule: Served Touch 3 AND did NOT click/engage
stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 3 served audience. Exclude: Touch 3 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

name: LUXY Ride — Touch 5 Pool
pixel_rule: Served Touch 4 AND did NOT click/engage
stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 4 served audience. Exclude: Touch 4 clickers. Exclude: Converted.
